findings.description: The `Message` class (PascalCase) is used directly in s4 code examples (`Message message = MessageUtil.createMessage(...)`) and is a key API class, but it is absent from s4 hints.
`MessageLevel` is used in the s5 code example (`MessageLevel.ERROR`) and is a PascalCase class/enum name, but it is absent from s5 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source s5 code: `Message message = MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG0001"); throw new ApplicationException(message);`
